description: Taste verdict gating for specific operations. Each operation has its own gating rules based on verdict severity.

cases.description: spawn MUST be blocked for toxic spores — dangerous code must never be placed in a working directory
spawn SHOULD warn for rotten spores — broken code may be spawned with explicit acknowledgement
spawn proceeds for safe or higher verdicts
spawn MUST be blocked for untasted spores — fail closed by default
grow MUST be blocked for toxic spores — prevents pulling malicious updates
grow SHOULD warn for rotten updates
absorb MUST be blocked for toxic spores — prevents merging malicious code
absorb SHOULD warn for rotten spores
absorb proceeds for safe or higher verdicts
bond MUST be blocked for toxic dependencies
bond proceeds for safe or higher verdicts
taste (download to cache for inspection) always proceeds regardless of verdict — you must be able to inspect toxic content to produce a verdict
sense (metadata fetch, no download) always proceeds — reading metadata is never dangerous
